title: Bitcoin: Bull Market Support Band Indicator Any Good? Take care!
author: MichaelIonita
summary_bullets: That's right guys, you want to know if the bull market support band is actually a good indicator.
I turned it into a trading strategy using AI so we can all see the performance.
And the reason I'm doing this video now is because more and more influencers are talking about this indicator including Benjamin Cohen.
He's using this indicator in a lot of his videos lately.
The problem is though that this indicator is in this video I'm going to show you the performance numbers.
I'm going to give you the code of the strategy version of the bull market support band.
I'm going to show you way better strategies.
And in my opinion, Benjamin Cohen, if you're watching this, love you man, you're amazing.
You should be using these other better strategies to decide if Bitcoin's price action is healthy or not.
But that's just my dubious speculation.

Before we can decide if this is a good result or not, you need to know that there are a couple of versions of this actually because you can interpret the indicator in different ways.

If you convert other indicators into strategies, for example, in this particular case, it can go long when the lines cross, but it can also go long when the close price closes above one of the lines or something else entirely.
So you need to know which version I just showed you and also you need to know if the other versions I just mentioned are better.
Version number one is the most obvious one is buying or going long when the green line crosses above the red line and is going flat when the green line crosses back below the red line.
So let's go to version number two and see if that is any better.
When it crosses under the EMA or it crosses under the SMA, it simply goes flat.
